value.found_quote: ChatGPT | AI Chatbot to Discover, Learn & Create ... Join hundreds of millions of users and try ChatGPT today.
value.rationale: The page is OpenAI's official ChatGPT overview page, clearly describing ChatGPT as an actively available AI chatbot product with multiple pricing tiers (Free, Go, Plus, Pro, Business, Enterprise), features, and a call to action to start using it today. The offering is unambiguously active and generally available.
